scenarios.title: Browser-history E2E uses the supported search contract

gherkin.given: the live stack exposes authenticated search as POST /api/search
gherkin.when: the browser-history E2E suite searches for browser-history artifacts
gherkin.then: the test sends a supported search request and asserts a successful parsed response

scenarios.title: Browser-history E2E fails if the stale GET search consumer returns

gherkin.given: the router does not expose authenticated GET /api/search
gherkin.when: a regression check scans or executes the browser-history E2E search path
gherkin.then: no browser-history E2E search request uses GET /api/search

linkedTests.testId: Regression guard for browser-history GET /api/search drift
